h1: Main Suite Fireplaces on HGTV’s Rock the Block
h2: Fireplace Design Tips from HGTV’s Rock the Block
7 Fireplace Design Options that Perfectly Match Today's Decor Trends

paragraphs: Embark on a journey into the captivating world of home design with the debut of season 5 of HGTV's Rock the Block. Explore the latest trends and transformative renovations that redefine modern living, featuring sleek fireplace additions and luxurious primary bedroom makeovers.

A fireplace wasn't initially part of Sarah's design plans, but then she met the Mezzo: a linear gas fireplace boasting one of the sleekest silhouettes in the industry. The Mezzo fireplace, complete with a marble accent wall and hearth, is now the primary bedroom’s defining feature. The team took a budget-friendly avenue by installing the stone themselves, making the fireplace addition even more of a worthwhile investment. "People love to have a fireplace in their bedroom," Bryan said. "Contrary to popular opinion, there are a couple of months down here where you’re wearing a jacket or a sweater in the evening."The Mezzo linear indoor gas fireplace perfectly accommodates a luxurious main bedroom suite , complete with captivating ribbon flame and elegant interior material options, like river rock or glass in a variety of colors. It’s easy to elevate your own home with this contemporary fireplace, which includes INTELLIFIRE TOUCH® technology - providing you with a touchscreen remote control or wireless wall switch. Quickly starting up a beautiful fire is a nighttime ritual we can all get behind.

The Mezzo linear fireplace is flanked opposite a custom linear headboard that Sarah designed. A Tray ceiling make this primary suite feel extra luxe, enhanced by floor-to-ceiling built-in cabinets that offer ample storage. Sarah rounded out the bedroom with sheer window treatments that washed the entire space in natural light accentuated by the Florida waterfront.

In a season marked by new beginnings, Keith and Evan introduced an unprecedented addition to the main suite: the debut of Rock the Block’s first walk-in closet fireplace. "Adding a fire feature in the closet brings a unique touch. Just switch it on while preparing in the morning, and it creates a cozy atmosphere as you enjoy your coffee," remarked Keith. "This closet is sure to make a statement.”

The design team tapped the SimpliFire Scion electric fireplace to enhance the primary suite with modern design and adaptable features. Its sleek aesthetic, accentuated by clear stone, driftwood logs, and LED flames, brings a touch of luxury to the space. Perfect for Florida's climate, you can enjoy the comforting glow of the fire year-round, with or without heat, making it ideal for creating ambiance regardless of the weather outside.Ready for your own main suite makeover? Find a dealer near you to get your HGTV-worthy fireplace.

The Mezzo linear gas fireplace features one of the cleanest designs in the industry, punctuated by end-to-end ribbon flames. A wide range of sizes and styles help make Mezzo yours – including trendy fire bed materials and timeless log sets – and heat-management options so you can enjoy the beauty of this linear fireplace near your TV. Available in 36-inch, 48-inch, 60-inch and 72-inch widths.

The Scion is a linear electric fireplace with a sophisticated design, including a modern, minimal front trim, no visible heater, and a built-in look with 16" tall glass for a stunning view. Your choice of crystal media or driftwood logs complements vibrant LED flames and customizable ember bed colors, creating a captivating ambiance that’s tailored to your interior design style. Available in 43 and 55-inch widths.

Dive into the stylish world of HGTV's Rock the Block. From organic modern to tropical retreats, discover how top designers transform living spaces with innovative fireplace designs. Unlock fresh decorating ideas and practical tips to elevate your home.
Discover how the right fireplace front can elevate any design style, from modern farmhouse to transitional.
Browse our photo gallery to find a fireplace design that reflects your unique style.
